title: My Education
description: I hold a Bachelor’s in Software Engineering from Nanjing University and a Master’s in Information and Communication Engineering from Donghua University. I also completed a Fullstack Coding Bootcamp at Le Wagon Shanghai, where I gained hands-on experience with modern web development tools and technologies. This education has equipped me with a strong foundation and practical skills for building innovative solutions.

items.degree: Masters in Information and Communication Engineering
Certificate of achievement from Le Wagon web development Bootcamp
